from __future__ import annotations


def helper_returns_success_shape_even_when_substeps_partially_fail_negative() -> dict[str, object]:
    saved = False
    indexed = True
    if not (saved and indexed):
        return {"ok": False, "error": "partial failure", "saved": saved, "indexed": indexed}
    return {"ok": True, "saved": saved, "indexed": indexed}
